name: uw-emotions-lab-conference
description: A real-time platform for studying social connection.
author: UW-Madison Psychology Lab

scripts.media:up: cd docker/ducksoup && cp -n env.example .env && docker compose up -d
scripts.build:manual: esbuild ./src/renderer/src/main.tsx --bundle --platform=browser --format=esm --jsx=automatic --outfile=out/renderer/assets/index-manual.js --loader:.css=css --asset-names=assets/[name]-[hash] && node scripts/write-manual-html.mjs && node scripts/copy-public.mjs && esbuild src/main/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=out/main/index.js --external:electron --external:@electron-toolkit/utils && esbuild src/preload/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=out/preload/index.js --external:electron --external:@electron-toolkit/preload
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
